sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13346" key="a)pocu/rhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποξῠ´ρ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n13346.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shaving off,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τριχῶν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:46:8:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.8.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
